In the past I’ve just dropped images, but I want to be more transparent about the process for anyone who wants to know how I made this or wants to try it themselves.

This one took a long time. I’m getting better at organizing in Google Sheets now so it didn’t completely destroy me like the Pixilate video did. I got obsessed and stopped sleeping and it was bad, but fun as hell.

I always start with a checklist of requirements. I decided that the intro, verse, pre-chorus, chorus, and outro combo was my sweet spot. It lets me do about half the song without it feeling too chopped up. My goals were to feature several Pokemon besides Lopunny, show her personality while dropping story hints, include easter eggs, and reference some favorite pop culture stuff. I also want to make sure she’s serving but with a dark twist.

Then I cast the cameos. Klefki was for the lock and key line. Luvdisc for the theme. For the crazy ex vibe, I needed a stoic opposite that's also ghost type. Golurk won because he’s a stud in a skirt.

For the narrative, I t with Gemini to build psychological profiles. Lopunny is a malignant histrionic. She was raised as a visual object, so being unseen is the same as being erased to her. She must occupy every inch of your mental space. She starts by getting rejected, goes on an unhinged journey, and ends by getting what she wants and DESERVES. Then I made lists of outfits, locations, and scene blocking down to the second.

I used a 1/3 to 2/3 production ratio. 1/3 is dancing anchor shots and the rest is story driven. That water stage idea came from watching Blackpink and it let me use a playground ball hit sound effect that is just so sonically pleasing.

Getting the hands right took so long. AI kept giving her human hands and I had to do so much manual fixing. I also got generations where she randomly developed clown shoes or Bugs Bunny ears. Even the pink boots in the final cut aren't perfectly consistent, but it is what it is. I ended up splicing the audio in Logic Pro at the last second because I wasn't done with the story and needed one final unhinged shot.

LMK if you have any other questions about the process!

🎧 Music: Scrappy Klutz (Lopunny Crash)

She's just a Pokemon in love, and can't be held responsible for her actions. 🎀🔪 They say love makes you crazy, therefore you can't call her crazy. 'Cause when you call her crazy, you're just calling her "in love." BLAM!! 💥

Because if Golurk really didn't want her back, why would he have talked to her in the first place? 😉

This is the visual "billboard" of the #HeartScales project. Her favorite Spice Girl is Scary Spice, but she'll tell you it's Baby. Her favorite Britney song is Toxic. She may be dabbling in a light histrionic personality disorder, but that's just what makes her so special.

Meowscarada, Pheromosa, and Meloetta are helping out. Prepare to surrender to the power of friendship. 💅

Part 2 of the Heart Scales story. Who do I do next? Full lyric video on youtube @KirbaiMusic

People sometimes ask my process, so here it is. First, my account name Kirbai is just Kirby + AI. This is an AI channel, which I totally understand if it’s not your thing. Still, it does take a massive amount of manual work and trial and error to get the details right. 🧪✨

I start in Google Sheets. I map out every second of the song, the scene summaries, the assets I need, and the prompts. Each video clip is about 5 sec, so for a 30-second video, I need AT LEAST 6 good images, but usually more cause I crop and change the speed.

For the music, I use Suno ($30/mo) because it’s the best quality out there. I’ll generate about 50 versions of a track, take notes on the best parts, and then splice a few of them together in Logic. Exporting the stems lets me clean up the audio and add manual harmonies with software like Melodyne.🎧⚡️

Gemini ($20/mo) is my go-to for base images using Nano Banana Pro. It’s great for new compositions, but I rarely get a usable result in one try. I usually take the base image into Photoshop to fix colors, scale, or mistakes manually. Sometimes I’ll use ChatGPT for environment references or Arena.ai to let different AIs “battle” so I can pick the best free result. 🎨 I mostly use Seedream4.0 to upscale once I’m done. TIP: Create character and environment reference sheets! Makes things much easier

Animation is the trickiest part and involves a lot of garbage generations. Grok is great for quick movement and it’s free, but it takes a lot of attempts to keep characters from looking like “Pixar” cartoons. For more complex stuff like evolutions or seamless loops, I use Gemini’s Veo 3 because it gives me “start and end frame” control. 📽️

Then I put things together in CapCut. I spend hours on speed ramps, transitions, and syncing things to the beat. I very rarely leave a clip at its normal speed. This is also where I add the final camera shakes, sound effects, and text layers etc.

If there’s anything you want to know feel free to ask me here.

Magic Bounce: The Stills 🔮🥀

WandaVision and Agatha are the best things the MCU has ever done, so I just had to reference them for this one.

My social media manager, Gemini, told me to keep my reels under 40 seconds for the algorithm, but I wanted a narrative so I made it long. I think Gemini was right, but f*ck it, the Gardevoir finale is going to be even longer.

For the people asking about the process: I use a ton of AI. I completely understand the value of 100% human art as well (I'm so impressed by them), but for the record, this video was maybe 30+ hours of work. It’s a grind.

Took a break from the music to finish the Banned Badge videos, but I'll get back to it after the next one!

🔮 Down, down, down the Road… Down this B!tch’s Road 🕯️

Music💿: "Magic Bounce" by Kirbai 
This is the villain origin story of the banned Hatterene.

After Iron Valiant was unjustly taken, Hatterene is determined to walk the Witch’s Road to bring her love home. To survive the journey, she’s gathered her coven, Braixen and Mismagius, to face the illusions of the forest. 🕸️🗝️

This project took a crazy amount of time. I got stuck in so many feedback loops trying to get the camera angle or textures just right, but it feels so good to finally be on the other side. I really wanted to try a more narrative video with this one and honor the Scarlet Witch and Agatha era that I love so much.

Gardevoir is horrified by all this, and she’s finally ready to make her presence known. 🌑👁️

#Kirbai #BannedBadge #WitchsRoad #AgathaAllAlong #ScarletWitch #WandaVision #Hatterene #IronValiant #PokemonArt #MCU
